ddls:
CREATE TABLE "meshblocks" (
  "meshblock_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each MeshBlock */,
  "area_unit_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the Area Unit the MeshBlock belongs to */,
  "territorial_authority_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the Territorial Authority the MeshBlock belongs to */,
  "dhb_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the District Health Board (DHB) the MeshBlock belongs to */,
  "count" INTEGER /* Count of a specific metric (e.g., population, households) within the MeshBlock */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the data was last updated */,
  "geography" TEXT /* Geographical coordinates or boundaries of the MeshBlock */,
  "population_density" REAL /* Population density of the MeshBlock */,
  "housing_units" INTEGER /* Number of housing units in the MeshBlock */,
  "median_income" REAL /* Median income of the population in the MeshBlock */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version of the data for historical tracking */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("meshblock_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_meshblocks_area_unit_id FOREIGN KEY ("area_unit_id") REFERENCES area_units ("area_unit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_meshblocks_dhb_id FOREIGN KEY ("dhb_id") REFERENCES district_health_boards ("dhb_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_meshblocks_territorial_authority_id FOREIGN KEY ("territorial_authority_id") REFERENCES territorial_authorities ("territorial_authority_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "area_units" (
  "area_unit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each Area Unit */,
  "area_unit_name" TEXT /* Name of the Area Unit */,
  "territorial_authority_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the Territorial Authority the Area Unit belongs to */,
  "dhb_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the District Health Board (DHB) the Area Unit belongs to */,
  "geography" TEXT /* Geographical coordinates or boundaries of the Area Unit */,
  "population_density" REAL /* Population density of the Area Unit */,
  "housing_units" INTEGER /* Number of housing units in the Area Unit */,
  "median_income" REAL /* Median income of the population in the Area Unit */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version of the data for historical tracking */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("area_unit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_area_units_dhb_id FOREIGN KEY ("dhb_id") REFERENCES district_health_boards ("dhb_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_area_units_territorial_authority_id FOREIGN KEY ("territorial_authority_id") REFERENCES territorial_authorities ("territorial_authority_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "territorial_authorities" (
  "territorial_authority_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each Territorial Authority */,
  "territorial_authority_name" TEXT /* Name of the Territorial Authority */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the Region the Territorial Authority belongs to */,
  "geography" TEXT /* Geographical coordinates or boundaries of the Territorial Authority */,
  "population_density" REAL /* Population density of the Territorial Authority */,
  "housing_units" INTEGER /* Number of housing units in the Territorial Authority */,
  "median_income" REAL /* Median income of the population in the Territorial Authority */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version of the data for historical tracking */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("territorial_authority_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_territorial_authorities_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "district_health_boards" (
  "dhb_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each District Health Board (DHB) */,
  "dhb_name" TEXT /* Name of the District Health Board (DHB) */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the Region the DHB belongs to */,
  "geography" TEXT /* Geographical coordinates or boundaries of the DHB */,
  "population_density" REAL /* Population density of the DHB */,
  "health_facilities" INTEGER /* Number of health facilities in the DHB */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version of the data for historical tracking */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dhb_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_district_health_boards_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each Region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the Region */,
  "geography" TEXT /* Geographical coordinates or boundaries of the Region */,
  "population_density" REAL /* Population density of the Region */,
  "median_income" REAL /* Median income of the population in the Region */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version of the data for historical tracking */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "demographics" (
  "demographic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each demographic record */,
  "meshblock_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the MeshBlock the demographic data belongs to */,
  "age_group" TEXT /* Age group of the population */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the population */,
  "ethnicity" TEXT /* Ethnicity of the population */,
  "population_count" INTEGER /* Count of the population in the specified demographic group */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the demographic data was collected */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version of the data for historical tracking */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("demographic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographics_meshblock_id FOREIGN KEY ("meshblock_id") REFERENCES meshblocks ("meshblock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "health_data" (
  "health_data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each health data record */,
  "meshblock_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the MeshBlock the health data belongs to */,
  "health_metric" TEXT /* Health metric being measured (e.g., average life expectancy, number of hospitalizations) */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the health metric */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the data was last updated */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the health data was collected */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version of the data for historical tracking */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("health_data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_health_data_meshblock_id FOREIGN KEY ("meshblock_id") REFERENCES meshblocks ("meshblock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., planner, health official, policymaker) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
